prompt: Using the uploaded image and without changing face create a stunning cinematic lifestyle portrait of the woman seated confidently at sunset in an urban desert-inspired setting, preserving her exact facial features, expression, hairstyle, body proportions, and identity with absolute accuracy. Transform the scene into a premium fashion editorial where she sits on a sleek custom sports car wheel beside a high-end modified vehicle, surrounded by warm golden-hour light and dramatic cotton-candy skies painted in shades of peach, orange, and violet. Enhance her colorful retro-inspired jacket, denim jeans, and sneakers with rich textures and realistic fabric detail while maintaining the original styling. Add subtle wind movement through her hair, glowing rim light outlining her silhouette, and beautiful bokeh from distant city lights and palm trees. Capture the scene with luxury automotive photography aesthetics, shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic skin texture, cinematic color grading, HDR lighting, razor-sharp focus on the subject, and an atmosphere of ambition, confidence, and youthful freedom. Photorealistic 8K resolution, Vogue x Porsche campaign quality, award-winning fashion photography, dynamic composition, emotional storytelling, and a powerful modern dreamer aesthetic.
